---
title: "The Very Rev. Thomas Garnier sr."
---

## The Very Rev. Thomas Garnier sr.

**Dates:** (1776-29 June 1873)

### Description

Dean of Winchester

### Biography

He became Dean of Winchester in 1840 and was also Rector of Bishopstoke, Hants.;  he resigned the rectory in 1868,  and the deanery about June 1872.  He married (1805) Mary Parry; and had four sons and four daus. [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 6th 1900
- Letter from Decr 22 [1869]
- Letter from December 16 [1869]
- Letter from 5th August 1865

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
